purpose: Define the approved source-owner handoff blocks required before Momentum Intelligence can be used as executive source truth.

requirements.label: Approved Momentum source extract
validationRules: brandId must match the active Brand Health Record
sourceDate must be present and traceable
requirements.canonicalUseCondition: Only approved_source extracts can make Momentum Intelligence canonical for executive use.
guardrails: Prototype-reviewed, browser-local, or static packets cannot satisfy this gate.
requirements.starterQuestion: Who is the accountable source owner for this brand/period extract?

requirements.label: Market, share, penetration, and category-growth extract
requirements.sourceOwnerRole: Growth Navigator / commercial analytics source owner
validationRules: roomToGrowInputs must use explicit penetration/share/category-growth fields
peerSet must name a selection basis
source period must be compatible with BBE period
requirements.canonicalUseCondition: Room-to-grow can be shown as executive-ready only when approved source-owner extract fields are loaded.
guardrails: Ahead/Behind cannot substitute for opportunity sizing.
Do not infer share or penetration from BBE scores.
requirements.starterQuestion: Which approved file owns penetration headroom, share gap, and category growth for this brand period?

requirements.label: BBE contribution-weight extract
validationRules: sourceLabel must identify market, category, period, and owner
requirements.canonicalUseCondition: SMD contribution-weight reads are executive-ready only when the approved extract supplies market/category/period weights.
guardrails: Do not infer contribution weights from simple metric direction.
Do not present directional prototype weights as model truth.
requirements.starterQuestion: Is there an approved contribution-weight model for this market/category/period?

requirements.label: BBE movement and significance extract
validationRules: metricReads must include metric-level significance status
requirements.canonicalUseCondition: Movement can be called significance-tested only when approved tracker evidence supplies metric-level significance.
guardrails: Do not present simple deltas as statistically significant movement.
Red momentum remains visible even when significance is missing.
requirements.starterQuestion: Which approved tracker extract contains metric-level significance for this brand period?

guardrails: The handoff registry is a source-owner checklist, not permission to promote source facts automatically.
Every requirement must map to a Momentum source readiness check.
Canonical writes and runtime auto-consumption remain disabled until governance enables them.
caveats: This registry defines the handoff contract; it does not prove that approved source files exist.
Approved extract files still need source-owner review, validation, and promotion workflow before executive use.
